questionHtml: Explain the role of electrons in superconducting materials in terms of the Bardeen–Cooper–Schrieffer (BCS) theory.
markschemeHtml:
Any three of:

passing electrons «slightly» deform lattice/displace positive ions/cations ✔

electrons couple/form Cooper pairs/condense with other electrons ✔

energy propagates along the lattice in wave-like manner/as phonons ✔

Cooper pair/electron condensate/pair of electrons moves through lattice freely
OR
phonons are «perfectly» elastic/cause no energy loss ✔

meta.title: Explain the role of electrons in superconducting materials in terms of the Bardeen–Cooper–Schrieffer (BCS) theory.
breadcrumbLabels: A.8 Superconducting metals and X-ray crystallography (HL only)
